title: Can music actually make customers spend more? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: One cheap change to a store's audio raised daily gross sales 38 percent, and not one shopper noticed. What the research shows about using music to lift how much customers spend, from tempo and mode to volume.

schema.headline: Can music actually make customers spend more?
schema.description: What 43,000 real transactions reveal about how store music and tempo affect customer spending.
